name: Generators
description: Silent diesel and portable generators for construction, commercial, and emergency power needs. From 5.5 kVA to 1000 kVA.

name: Compaction Equipment
description: Vibratory rollers and compaction equipment for asphalt, soil, and road construction projects.

name: Air Compressors
description: Portable diesel air compressors for construction, mining, and industrial applications requiring compressed air on-site.

name: Welders
description: Diesel engine-driven welding generators for pipeline construction, fabrication, and maintenance work.

name: Light Towers
description: Mobile diesel-powered light towers for construction sites, events, and emergency lighting with extendable masts.

name: Scaffolding Towers
description: Mobile aluminum and steel scaffolding towers for indoor and outdoor maintenance, painting, and construction access.

name: Pressure Washers
description: High-performance electric and diesel pressure washers for residential, commercial, and industrial cleaning tasks.

name: Floor Cleaners
description: Professional floor scrubbing and cleaning machines for hard floors in hotels, hospitals, schools, and commercial spaces.

name: Floor Grinders
description: Heavy-duty concrete floor grinders for surface preparation, coating removal, and polishing in construction projects.

name: Pipe Threaders
description: Heavy-duty pipe threading and cutting machines for plumbing, HVAC, and industrial piping work.

name: Air Coolers
description: Portable evaporative air coolers for construction sites, warehouses, workshops, and outdoor events. High-capacity cooling for hot UAE conditions.

name: Exhaust Fans
description: Industrial exhaust and ventilation fans for confined spaces, welding bays, underground works, and construction site air extraction.

name: Industrial Fans
description: Heavy-duty drum, pedestal, and floor fans for construction cooling, drying, and ventilation. High-velocity air movement for large spaces.

name: Vacuum Cleaners
description: Professional wet and dry vacuum cleaners for construction site cleanup, dust extraction, and industrial debris removal.

name: Power Cables
description: Industrial power cables and extensions for construction site electrical distribution. Single-phase and 3-phase heavy-duty cable solutions from 16A to 63A.

name: Marble Cutters
description: Professional marble and tile cutting machines for construction and renovation projects. Wet and dry cutting for porcelain, granite, and ceramic tiles.

name: Concrete Mixers
description: Site concrete mixers for construction and civil engineering projects. Diesel and electric drum mixers for small to medium concrete batch production.

name: Gas Cylinders
description: Industrial gas cylinders for construction and fabrication. LPG, oxygen, argon, and acetylene cylinders for welding, cutting, and heating applications.

name: Bar Benders
description: Electric rebar bending machines for construction steel work. Heavy-duty bar bending equipment for reinforced concrete preparation.

name: Steel Cutters
description: Heavy-duty steel bar cutting machines for construction rebar processing. Electric and hydraulic bar cutters for reinforced concrete preparation.

name: Cable Crimpers
description: Battery-powered hydraulic cable crimping tools for electrical installation and industrial cabling. Professional-grade crimping for copper and aluminum conductors.
